Episodes.Title: Racing the Storm
Episodes.Actors: David Bamber, Peter James Haworth, Stephen Bogaert
Episodes.Plot: American Airlines flight 1420 crashed upon landing in Little Rock, AR (USA) in the middle of a severe thunderstorm in 1999.

Episodes.Title: Unlocking Disaster
Episodes.Actors: David Bamber, Jano Frandsen, Chris Gibson
Episodes.Plot: On United Airlines flight 811, the cargo door suddenly opens in-flight and tears a portion of the fuselage. The crew attempts landing back in Honolulu.

Episodes.Title: Flying Blind
Episodes.Actors: David Bamber, Stephen Bogaert, Victor A. Young
Episodes.Plot: AeroPeru flight 603 crashed on a routine flight from Lima to Santiago in 1996, due to a severe failure with the flight instruments.

Episodes.Title: Flying on Empty
Episodes.Actors: Stephen Bogaert, Guy Richer, Nick Baillie
Episodes.Plot: Air Transat flight 236 ran out of fuel in-flight over the North Atlantic due to a mysterious leak, forcing the crew to glide to the nearest airfield.

Episodes.Title: Cutting Corners
Episodes.Actors: David Bamber, Ray Kahnert, Barry Flatman
Episodes.Plot: In January 2000, Alaska Airlines flight 261 crashed off the Californian coastline with no survivors due to, as the title implies, improper maintenance.

Episodes.Title: Fire on Board
Episodes.Actors: David Bamber, Christopher Bondy, Richard Quesnel
Episodes.Plot: Swissair flight 111 suffered a fire in-flight and crashed while attempting an emergency landing in Halifax in 1998.
